providers.action_required: Senior 1 must publish host, edge and infrastructure process budgets using capacity-budget-v0.
Senior 2 owns database capacity contract failures and must preserve connection and recovery budgets.

Senior 3 must publish runtime-capacity-budget-v0 with hard OCPU, memory, disk, PostgreSQL connections, queue/retry bounds and failure behavior. ValidationManifest CPU/memory hints alone are insufficient.
Senior 4 owns telemetry and host-observability capacity contract failures.
